meta.azimuth_convention: 0=N clockwise (internal); pvlib solpos and surface_azimuth both 0=N in pvlib>=0.11 -> no remap
meta.note: POA components use fixed synthetic GHI/DNI/DHI to isolate transposition. Compare poa_global (our beam+circumsolar+isotropic+ground sum) with tol max(2 W/m2, 1.5%). Sun el<=3 deg cases: no-explosion only, not equality (our Rb cap deviates).
